info.title: API
info.description:
Auto-generated Swagger / OpenAPI documentation covering all modules, submodules, and endpoints.

Authentication: JWT Bearer tokens (Authorization: Bearer <token>) from middlewares/auth.js.

List endpoints support pagination via `page` and `limit`.
